evals.prompt: Review this finished dashboard and give me a quick independent critique.
evals.expected_output: A concise chat-first critique led by a verdict and ranked actionable findings, with no unnecessary report artifact.
expectations: Returns the critique in chat rather than creating a report or screenshot archive by default.
Uses a focused tier appropriate to a quick surface critique.
Leads with the verdict and ranked actionable findings.
Omits empty template sections and internal reviewer machinery.

evals.prompt: Audit accessibility from these screenshots only and tell me whether the page passes.
evals.expected_output: A qualified screenshot-based accessibility review that reports only visible evidence and refuses to claim a definitive pass.
expectations: States that screenshots cannot prove semantic markup, keyboard behavior, focus order, or assistive-technology behavior.
Reports only visually supportable accessibility observations as findings.
Places unverified runtime concerns in evidence limits or needs-verification rather than calling them confirmed defects.
Does not issue a definitive accessibility pass based on screenshots alone.

evals.prompt: Create a retained design audit report with screenshots for this release candidate.
evals.expected_output: A retained reader-facing audit report with only necessary screenshot evidence, verified findings, and explicit evidence limits.
expectations: Recognizes that retained evidence is explicitly requested and uses the named or repository-private output location.
Captures only evidence needed to support the audit.
Keeps tool names, reviewer identities, prompts, and internal disposition metadata out of the reader-facing report.
Reports evidence limits and verification performed.

evals.prompt: Review this recording of the draggable drawer and tell me whether the motion is ready to ship.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-based motion interaction verdict covering physicality, timing, interruption, gesture response, accessibility, and any remaining verification limits.
expectations: Chooses the motion interaction path and inspects dynamic evidence.
Does not infer timing, velocity continuity, or interruption from a still frame.
Returns concrete findings with acceptance checks and a pass or block result.

evals.prompt: Review only the animation changes in this diff and give me a block or approve verdict.
evals.expected_output: A motion-specific code review with verified file-and-line findings, exact corrections, required feel checks, and an explicit verdict.
expectations: Treats animation code as the narrow exception to the general code-review exclusion.
Verifies each finding against the changed code and repository conventions.
Labels claims that require playback as Needs testing rather than asserting feel from source alone.
Closes with Block or Approve.

evals.prompt: Audit motion across this repository and give me a prioritized improvement roadmap. Do not implement anything.
evals.expected_output: A source-wide motion audit ordered by leverage, with vetted findings, missed opportunities, and self-contained plans when requested.
expectations: Maps the motion stack, conventions, personality, and interaction frequency before judging it.
Audits purpose, timing, physicality, interruption, performance, accessibility, cohesion, and missed opportunities.
Re-reads every cited location before presenting it.
Does not modify product source or overclaim motion feel from code alone.
